summary: Replay ADR 0380 from the latest origin/main baseline, verify the public browser route end to end, and prove the corrected Proxmox UDP forwarding contract stays in place.

verification.observed: The clean-cache exact-main converge completed successfully and left proxmox-host idempotent on the forwarding replay.
The ws-0380 closeout regression suite completed with 81 passed tests.
All 9 Neko instances validated after the final converge.
The public browser edge redirected through oauth2-proxy, selected backend 10.10.10.21:8080, and completed the WebRTC handshake.
runtime-comms listened on the expected TCP signalling ports 8080 through 8088.
The Proxmox host forwarded UDP 50000-60000 to 10.10.10.21 and exposed no public TCP 8080 DNAT rule.

notes: The workstream replayed ADR 0380 from the latest origin/main baseline in an isolated worktree before merging back to main.
An earlier stale Proxmox forwarding state still pointed at 10.10.10.41; the final exact-main converge and forwarding proof confirm the live contract now targets runtime-comms at 10.10.10.21 only.
